raw_consumer_statement:
I wanted to take some time to provide a formal explanation of the events that occurred on the evening of XXXX XXXX XXXX and leading into the early hours of XXXX XXXX XXXX  so that the investigator can make an informed decision as to whether or not to uphold my dispute. 

To lead with the primary point : I did not authorize this transaction for {$210.00}. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I visited The XXXX XXXX and initially gave them my Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX to hold my tab. When closing out the tab, my husband instructed the merchant to charge his XXXX XXXX XXXX card instead. I have confirmed with XXXX XXXX that his card was indeed charged on XX/XX/XXXX for XXXX separate transactions related to this visit : {$47.00} and {$34.00}. I have also provided statements to Citi proving that these charges occurred. 

I have no receipts for any goods or services totaling {$210.00} from The XXXX XXXX. I contacted the merchant to inquire about this charge, and they were unable to locate a credit card slip for this amount. I am very careful about keeping my receipts, and I have XXXX other receipts from The XXXX XXXX from that evening ( XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX ). It seems highly unlikely that I would have made a purchase for {$210.00} and not retained the receipt. I assure you that if Citi reaches out to the merchant, there will be no credit card slipped signed by me authorizing this amount. 

Despite countless efforts, Citi refused to credit my account.
